description.short: In addition to the standard of Indonesia Care, all guests get free Wi-Fi in all rooms and free parking if arriving by car. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Rated with 3 stars, this high-quality property provides guests with access to massage, restaurant and fitness center on-site.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 2-3 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 4 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A hotel with very good facilities, the rooms are also very spacious with a pool facility that is rare in Banda Aceh.
comments.originalComment: Hotel dengan fasilitas yang sangat baik, kamarnya juga sangat luas dengan fasilitas pool yang jarang ditemukan di Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is great, close to everything, the hotel staff is very friendly, and the service is good.👍
comments.originalComment: Hotel nya keren, dekat kemana2, karyawan hotel nya sangat ramay sekali, pelayanan nya bgus👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I cant get an official receipt to make a claim from my company. The hotel does not provide payment made direct to AGODA. And AGODA  is unable to send via email. The fuction seems to be down. Not sure why. This is not the first time. IF i cant get reimburse from my company, I will have to change to other service provider. 

Please help me  urgently




Michael SOh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Agado does not issue or unable to issue due to system down

The same for Grand Nanggroe Hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is quite nice, there is a swimming pool and gym even though there are not many equipment, but for that price it is fine. What is very unfortunate is that when I left my room key in the room, the receptionist asked me to go back to the room to get the key so I could check out, but after I searched for the key, it had already been taken by the staff. The receptionist should be friendlier and more communicative, especially since there was no apology at all for making me confused and having to go back and forth from the upper floor to the lower floor.
comments.reviewTitle: The receptionist staff is not very communicative and polite.
comments.originalTitle: Staf recepsionist kurang komunikatif dan sopan
comments.originalComment: Hotelnyaa lumayan bagus, ada kolam renang dan gym meskipun alatnya tidak terlalu banyak namun utk harga segitu sdh oke. Yang sangat disayangkan adalah saat kartu kamar tertinggal di kamar, recepsionist meminta saya mengambil kembali kartu ke kamar agar bisa checkout namun setelah saya mencari cari kartu diatas ternyata kartu sdh diambil oleh stafnya. Seharusnya recepsionist bisa lebih ramah dan komunikatif, terlebih tidak ada permintaan maaf sama sekali karna sudah buat saya kebingungan dan bolak balik dari lt atas ke lt bawah

comments.reviewComments: We don't recommend this place; the room is dusty, there are many mosquitoes, and when we asked for the hotel bill, it was wrong and they said they couldn't fix it...

comments.reviewTitle: Breakfast totally failed.my family having a diarrehea

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I chose this hotel as I wanted to use the swimming pool everyday during my stay there. I was not allowed to use the pool as the pool area was used for a wedding reception. I wish I was told earlier on so that I could cancel my booking. I tried to check out after my first day and I asked for reimbursement. The hotel management agreed to reimburse but at the promotional rate. When the staff later told me that they could only pay the following day as Sunday is a public holiday, I changed my mind about checking out. I will never stay at that hotel or recommend anyone staying there. 

The hotel is far from the city centre. The room is big and clean but it  is old. Water is leaking from the sink in the bathroom. It is  a very disappointing stay at the hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I dont usually complain about any hotel.
in fact most of the time i think they are all pretty decent and comfortable..

Grand Nanggroe Hotel was great too.. from check in to the rooms, no complains.

until i observe 2 things.
1: my room 4015 has a faulty door... the door itself, seems to be too short for its frame... therefore exposing the locking mechanics for the door lock. 
To open the door, simply inserting any card towards the locking mechanics through the door frame.. the mechanics of the lock will be pushed in and the door be open.. no key card needed.

this is quite a serious security breach.

having a long trip, we're tired to change a room again, this cause us to actually bring out every valuable we have when we leave the room.


2nd point, the bed sheets and blanket are really dirty.. initially i thought it's just dull in color. that judgement proves to be a bad mistake when i was badly awaken by itch on my legs and feet, areas covered by the blanket. from 2 am to 4 am, i couldn't sleep. i didnt want to make a complain to the counter as well.. this will cause people to start roaming in, lots of waiting and most likely will disturb my friend's sleep.

as much as i made my complain the next morning, i hope they can do better.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Stayed one night at the hotel, got warm greetings from the staffs. The amenities were a little bit old such as towels, but clean.
comments.reviewPositives: The hotel located close to the airport but not to far from the city center

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
They picked us from the airport and along the way the driver helped us with few information. Receptionist were also helpful and suggested us places to go such as salon and spa, what transport to take and all others.
Hotel is quite out of town so privacy is kept well.
the price also reasonable. i would reccomend this to friends.
comments.reviewTitle: Services are good and above expectations

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The stay was enjoyable for us as the location of the hotel is close to the airport and city. The staff were polite, helpful and welcoming. The room is decent but could be better maintained. There was no freezer (a key requirement for good hotels, and tempered our enjoyment of the facility to some extent). The rates could have been more competitive given the rise of new hotels around the city and the non-peak time of travel.
comments.reviewTitle: Good service but lacking key facilities.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: we just stay here for the night, its quite good, but a bit far from the downtown, but the upside is closer to the airport, just 15 minutes away. they also give u free shuttle between pick up from the airport or from the hotel to the airport (choose one).
comments.reviewPositives: clean, big room, near the airport
comments.reviewTitle: great hotel but a little bit outside of the town

the grand naggroe hotel is a good hotel. it is clean and the service is top. ifeel very welcomed there and the stay was comfotable.

however, just 1 area where things could be improved. the wifi in rooms are not so strong. the signal is weak. i had to sit atthe cafe or lobby for a better connection.

overall, its a good hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Ok boleh lah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
我们要去中心二个地方.在问总台线路时.服务生说很远.二个地方又彼此之间不同方向,他们马上就说给我们按排酒店内的车辆.价格是50万印尼元+50万印尼元.
我们去后才知道二个地方就在中心区也不远.1小时多些时间后我们回酒店,驾驶员直接收费100万印尼元,我们准备另外支付小费10万元.但驾驶员说没有零钱找.就直接收了50万小费.这样我们总支付是150万印尼元.
车费被宰了.(我们夫妻二人在国内都有车辆的.知道实际距离往返总的公里数才9KM+9KM=18KM.

2小时后我们走出酒店,自己在路边叫了双人摩的,再去这二个地方.收费是1万印尼+1万印尼元.
(1美元对换当地货币8900印尼元.)
comments.reviewTitle: 不要接受总台按排的服务生驾驶的车辆.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Kami menginap 2 malam Baru datang disambut oleh pembawa kopor yang lebih mirip satpam dan kurang ramah/wajah kaku. Di front desk hanya ada 1 staf wanita yang cukup ramah. Lorong menuju kamar agak gelap. Masuk kmr ac tidak dingin, stlh dibetulkan agak dingin. Sewaktu sy komplen mengenai AC, petugas bilang bahwa udara diluar memang sedang panas, padahal saya baru pindah dari hotel di seberangnya yang jauh lebih dingin. Saya memilih hotel ini karena ada kolam renang. Di kamar tidak ada kulkas, remot tv, pemanas air, kursi kerja dan meja tamu juga tidak ada. Pemanas air dan kursi kerja diberi setelah ada permintaan. Pesan makan siang capcay kuah dan ca’ brokoli+tahu tidak enak sepeti kurang bumbu. Kamar mandi saluran pembuangan air macet, air tergenang. Handuk2 benangnya sudah mbrodol, tidak tersedia sabun mandi cair. Makan malam pesan tenderloin steak hampir satu jam baru siap. Petugas sarapan di restoran kurang berfungsi.
Kelebihan: kmr cukup luas, ada internet dgn pasword.
comments.reviewPositives: Hotel dipilih karena dekat dengan lokasi acara keluarga, dan ada kolam renang.
comments.reviewTitle: Hotel dengan kamar dan pelayanan kurang baik

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Keadaan kamar hotel dan kamar mandi cukup bersih. Pelayanan ramah, membuat saya nyaman selama berada di sana.
Semoga dijaga terus mutunya, dan kalau bisa ditingkatkan.
comments.reviewPositives: kamar nyaman, pelayanan memuaskan sesuai harga

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Hotel yang cukup baik untuk di daerah tersebut, namun sayangnya ternyata tepat di seberang jalan terdapat fasilitas pembangkit listrik tenaga diesel PLN yang menyala 24 jam dengan suara yang cukup mengganggu (khusus kamar yang menghadap ke jalan raya).
Fasilitas kamar cukup baik, standar saja hanya tekanan air pada shower dirasa sangat kurang, walau air panas tersedia.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
WIFI var ustabilt og i blant helt borte.
Stundom var overflatevannet i bassenget dårlig reingjort.
Styrten ved bassenget mer eller mindre ute av funksjon, noe som sannsynligvis påvirker hvor reint bassengvannet er. 
Manglet solsenger ved bassenget.
Trimrommet rotete og svakt utstyrt.
